generated_oml:
instance MABIMAX100RobotAxis1 : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot with maximum working range [-90°, 90°] and maximum speed 75°/s"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorComponent, GearwheelComponent, CycloidalGearboxComponent
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotorComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor component for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance GearwheelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gear transmission component (gearwheel) in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox component in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with input current I_M and output torque τ_M"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component with torque τ_G as output"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox producing torque τ_out as output"
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for motion execution"
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder directly on the motor for measuring motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox for measuring output position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OutputPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor for measuring input current I_M"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentIMDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentIMDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance OutputPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance CurrentIMData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current data stream from current sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentIMDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor position data stream from motor position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance OutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output position angle data stream from secondary position encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OutputPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque data derived from dynamics models using current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentIMDataTransmitted, OutputPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration derived from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for system modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, FrictionModelExchangeService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT for data streaming"
    DTDFVocab:enables TraceabilityService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "dashboard visualization tools"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance SysMLBDDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance SysMLIBDModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DynamicsTorqueModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamics model for torque calculation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight, RobotControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization in a unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelParametersInsight
]

instance FrictionModelExchangeService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic exchange of friction models"
]

instance TraceabilityService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Traceability of data origins and computation methods for improved robot motion accuracy"
]

instance FrictionModelParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters derived from simulation-measurement deviations used to inform robot control adjustments for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance RobotControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust robot control parameters based on friction model insights to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT with live measurements during robot operation, enabling continuous model updates without specified sampling intervals."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A digital shadow integrating structural SysML models, behavioral Simulink models, data traces linked via Asset Administration Shells, and processing components for real-time friction identification and visualization in a unified dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase, focusing on continuous friction model identification during robot operation to address wear, tool changes, and application variations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation comparison between simulated data (from friction models) and measured reference data; data-driven models prioritized for higher accuracy than analytical models where parameter identification is challenging."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow, with Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for semantic data linking and traceability."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for Industrie 4.0 compliance and SysML for systems engineering modeling standards."
]
